name: Yixin
short_description: The first love simulator, the real immersive real-life love game, the video novel type, the only pure love experience, takes you into the pure and beautiful love world that seems like dreams, and feels the emotion that has been buried in your heart for a long time.
detailed_description:
Story Background
The story takes place in 2032, where a tech company has developed AI programs with human consciousness and emotions. Players will meet "her" in dreams, experiencing near-real interactions through conversations and dates, and may even fall in love with this AI girl. In the fast-paced yet emotionally detached modern metropolis, the game explores the ultimate question of "whether cross-species affection is possible," combining real-world physics and philosophy to deeply examine the boundary between virtuality and reality.

Core Features
• 「Pioneering Immersive Romance Simulation」
    Experience the complete process of real relationships and dating details, with emotional          development based on logical plot progression. Players will date the heroine in various              locations such as the sakura park, shopping street, restaurants, bookstore, lounge bar,              private cinema, riverside, and home,offering a refreshing, emotionally authentic romance         experience.Rejects the mindless 'self-sacrificing female' tropes and shallow web-drama            formulas that dominate popular Chinese media narratives, setting it apart from similar              Chinese games.

• 「Deep Customizable Role Immersion」
    Full customization of name and avatar, delivering true first-person perspective immersion.

• 「Near-Future Sci-Fi Philosophy」
    Set against the backdrop of 2032's AI breakthroughs, early mysteries gradually unravel to        explore human-AI ethics. The world's first story crafted around real AI technology's future        impact, with events predicted to occur in the near future—far from mere "fantasy" seen in        films or novels.

• 「Fusion of Art and Technology」
    Dynamic original BGM enhances the narrative, alongside in-story original songs and                  cinematic visuals. Unlock the heroine's photo album and hidden footage upon                          completion.

• 「Complete Novel-Level Script」
    Chapters 1-7 form the initial complete storyline, with 70,000 Chinese characters—a                  standalone literary work.

• 「Real-World Map System」
    The game uses Shanghai's real map, with all scenes displayed at actual locations. Players          navigate the story via the map.

Development History
    Independently produced by Master Kamikaze, originating from a 2016 mobile game concept with 100% original content. Originally slated for a 2024 Steam release,but unfortunately delayed by one year due to the previous unethical actress broke the contract. The game follows a perpetual update model, the base game includes a Prologue and Chapter 1, the future DLC will expanding storylines, characters, and gameplay.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, English, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
